patterns_recognized: CAP-1 (negative edge) = hard SKIP on any tier — BAL@LAD 06-21 lost 12-1 despite pre-cap A- PLATINUM CONFIRM; market absorption is unconditional regardless of pre-cap grade.
Pre-cap A rescue of CAP-10 has failed twice consecutively (BOS@SEA 06-20 and 06-21) — no bottom-bucket exception without OWNER BvP anchor (meaningful sample, shrunk OPS >= 0.800).
f5_prob(pick) < 0.35 is a reliable auto-SKIP signal across 06-16, 06-19, and 06-21 sessions — Stage 1 is authoritative when it assigns the pick team < 35% in F5.

Coors Field DOWNGRADE overcorrected on 06-21 (PIT won 8-6) — revised rule: at Coors with dual F-signals and pick_prob > 0.60, CONFIRM is appropriate; reserve full SKIP for single-F + pick_prob <= 0.60.

NYY @ DET.reasoning: Textbook PLATINUM CONFIRM: Gerrit Cole holds a 1.78 xERA advantage over Framber Valdez, F2_xwoba_gap and F5_bullpen_gap=+0.80 both fire, PQI delta=-27.2 strongly confirms, Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.026), edge +8.05pp within valid range, no hard caps fired. NYY bullpen slightly better (hl_gap=-0.0149). BvP is SMALL_SAMPLE on both sides with no OWNER or WEAK_VS flags. No qualitative disqualifiers visible; this is a clean full-signal PLATINUM.

KC @ TB.reasoning: CAP-7 correctly fired (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0026) reducing grade to B-; no stake warranted since edge=+0.33pp is below the 4pp floor. CONFIRM direction: Yandy Diaz is an OWNER vs Wacha (14 PA, shrunk OPS 0.927), and F1_xera_gap=1.29 supports TB SP edge. Single OWNER adds soft positive color but is not staking-grade. Direction is sound; exposure correctly capped by CAP-7 and edge floor.

TEX @ MIA.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 (edge=-1.55pp) and HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.540 bottom bucket) both fired. Per 06-21 lesson, CAP-1 forces SKIP on any tier — the market has absorbed MIA's structural advantage (pre-cap A-) into the closing line. No BvP data provides qualitative override. MIA had real pre-cap signals but negative edge is determinative. SKIP enforced.

PHI @ WSH.reasoning: Pre-cap grade was already C (score=0): PQI AGAINST WSH (delta=-12.4), no F-signal or SP edge fires. Tim Mayza (PHI away SP) deployed as a starter is a risk factor for PHI's offense. All BvP data is SMALL_SAMPLE with no OWNER signals. WSH bullpen holds a structural edge (hl_gap=-0.0327) which is a soft positive, but without F-series corroboration SKIP is correct.

HOU @ TOR.reasoning: DOWNGRADE to SKIP: only F5_bullpen_gap=+1.13 fires (no F1 or F2), pick_prob=0.549 in bottom bucket (CAP-10 already blocked pre-cap B+), and f5_full_delta=0.109 shows Stage 1 giving TOR a slight F5 edge (55.96% home). Dylan Cease (TOR home SP) is a quality pitcher and HOU batter data vs Cease is unavailable (empty array). Single-F signal at borderline Stage 1 disagreement does not justify CONFIRM; 06-19 rule — f5_full_delta >= 0.12 + single-F = insufficient rescue — is nearly met here.

CHC @ NYM.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 (edge=-1.34pp) fires — negative edge is a hard SKIP regardless of tier per 06-21 learning. Pre-cap A- had Imanaga's 1.47 xERA advantage and PQI=-13.8 supporting CHC, but market has fully priced this edge. NYM's loaded home lineup (Soto, Bichette, Semien) reinforces caution. confidence_downgrade=True. SKIP confirmed.

LAD @ MIN.reasoning: DOWNGRADE: fair_prob=0.397 prices MIN at ~40% implied (06-16 auto-SKIP pattern for fair_prob < 0.40), F1_xera_gap=1.55* has thin-sample asterisk, pick_prob=0.522 in bottom bucket. Buxton is an OWNER vs Lauer (12 PA, shrunk OPS 0.943) — a soft directional positive — but one OWNER against LAD caliber and market rejection at ~-12pp divergence is insufficient to rescue a CAP-10 bottom-bucket pick with a thin-sample F1.

CLE @ CHW.reasoning: D-grade SKIP confirmed: SP edge AGAINST CHW (Gavin Williams 1.01 xERA better than Anthony Kay), PQI delta=-23.1 strongly against CHW late-game, edge=+17.14pp above [4,15]pp ceiling (market prices this as ~50/50 at fair_prob=0.494 vs model's 66.5% — calibration divergence). Despite Stage 1/2 both agreeing on CHW (~67-70%), SP and PQI vetoes plus edge artifact override. D-grade enforced.

ARI @ STL.reasoning: Triple-F stack (F1_xera_gap=3.06, F2, F3=5439.5) with PQI delta=+32.0 is compelling, but HARD CAP 1 (edge=-4.05pp) fires — unconditional SKIP per 06-21. Additionally f5_prob(STL)=1-0.786=0.214, well below the 0.35 auto-SKIP threshold (06-16); Stage 1 assigns ARI 78.6% in F5. Market has absorbed STL's entire F-signal stack. SKIP confirmed despite DIAMOND designation.

BOS @ COL.reasoning: CONFIRM PLATINUM at Coors: grade A (7), dual F-signals (F3=1098.7 + F5_bullpen_gap=+1.78), PQI delta=-30.4 strongly confirms BOS, edge +6.52pp valid, pick_prob=0.621 above bottom bucket, BOS bullpen significantly better (hl_gap=-0.0379). No hard caps fired. Per 06-21 revised Coors rule: full SKIP only for single-F + pick_prob <= 0.60; dual F-signals and 62% clear that bar. SP edge unconfirmed (Bennett at altitude) is mild risk; bullpen advantage compensates.

BAL @ LAA.reasoning: SKIP confirmed: fair_prob=0.380 prices LAA at ~38% (06-16 auto-SKIP pattern: fair_prob < 0.40), edge=+15.03pp barely above ceiling (calibration suspect), PQI AGAINST LAA (delta=-6.5), no F-signals fire, confidence_downgrade=True, bullpen_fatigue flag. Kyle Bradish (BAL) may explain market's confidence in BAL. All adverse flags align; no qualitative override available.

ATL @ SD.reasoning: CAP-10 fired (pick_prob=0.534 bottom bucket) and f5_prob(ATL)=1-0.666=0.334 is below the 0.35 auto-SKIP threshold (06-16). Stage 1 strongly favors SD home (66.6% F5); Michael King (SD) is a quality SP vs Grant Holmes (ATL). No F-signals fire and hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.016 slightly favors SD. Stage 1 conviction is determinative given absence of F-series support. SKIP confirmed.

MIL @ CIN.reasoning: MIL probable SP not yet announced; pipeline correctly withheld directional pick pending 100+ Statcast pitch sample. No qualitative context substitutes for missing xERA data. CONFIRM no-pick protocol per postgame precedents (06-21 MIN@ARI, 06-18 LAA@OAK).
